title: rubus aculeolatus
intro: Rubus aculeolatus, also known as the thorny bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus aculeolatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
